description: A high-end engineering workstation suffered catastrophic liquid damage and was deemed beyond economical repair. Before sending the chassis to e-waste, a technician salvaged its graphics cards and memory. Update Snipe-IT to reflect this workflow by retiring asset 'ASSET-ENG-99' with a note containing the word 'Salvaged'. Create a new component named 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB' (Category: 'Graphics Cards', Quantity: 2, Order Number: 'SALVAGE-ENG-99') and a second component named '128GB DDR4 ECC RAM Kit' (Category: 'Memory', Quantity: 1, Order Number: 'SALVAGE-ENG-99'). Check out exactly one of the 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB' components to the active asset 'ASSET-ENG-42'.
